ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status. Case Consoliated With 287323
Off Calendar Sep-19-2006 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Edward A Koplowitz appearing for administrator. Steven Lau appearing for Peng Zhu Xiao. Status of the civil case reported. Trial date is set for early December. The Will Contest trial will take more than two one-half day to try. Mr. Lau said the Will Contest trial should come first. Mr. Koplowitz objected. Court is referring this matter to the Presiding Judge to set for trial. If they can not get a trial date before the civil trial date, counsel can come back to this court. Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Teena Paxton, CSR #1558. Clerk: Ella Yip.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status. Case Consoliated With 287323
Off Calendar Feb-22-2006 Continued To Sep-19-06 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Norman Reitz appearing for and with Frank Shew. Steven Lau appearing for Peng Shu Xiao. The civil case is set for trial in July. Mr. Lau will be requesting a continuance of the trial date to August. Matter is continued to 9/19. Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Katy Bersamin, CSR 11722. Clerk: Ella Yip.
